title: Support WallStreet Morocco
subtitle: This website is an independent project, ad-free and investor-free. It runs entirely on the passion of making finance accessible to every Moroccan.
warmMessage: Even $1 makes a difference. Every contribution helps keep this service free and improve the tools available to the Moroccan investor community.
revolutSubtitle: SEPA / international transfer · Card · PayPal via Revolut
attijariSubtitle: Local MAD transfer · AAW app · Attijari branches
scanQR: Scan with the AAW app or your bank app
amountNote: These amounts are indicative. Any donation, even symbolic, is deeply appreciated.

amounts.1: The price of a coffee ☕ — thank you!
amounts.5: Covers one hour of server costs 🖥️

noAdsBody: The site contains no ads and will never sell your data to advertisers.
freeForAllBody: All content — markets, calendar, portfolio, learning — will always remain free.
madeForMoroccansBody: A project born from the belief that every Moroccan deserves access to quality financial tools.
thankYouBody: Your support, in whatever form, allows WallStreet Morocco to continue to exist and grow. Every dirham, every euro, every dollar counts.
legalNotice: WallStreet Morocco is an independent personal project. Donations are voluntary contributions and do not entitle the donor to any commercial benefit.
